French contributors are welcome. You can write this issue in French or English.
Les contributeurs francophones sont les bienvenus. Vous pouvez ouvrir cette issue en français ou en anglais.

## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem it solves

What challenge or friction does this address?

## Proposed direction

How should it work?

## Challenge type

- Network capture
- DNS
- Crypto helper
- Tooling / UX
- Other

## Additional context

Anything else that would help shape the feature.
